sourceAmbiguity: Provider consoles often accept arbitrary HTTPS callback URLs, which could lead operators to paste worker, queue, or private admin routes.
decisionTaken: The manifest allows only /edge/signal/* callback paths with endpointScope=edge and blocks known non-edge path families.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Phase 2 provider configuration stops at the signed edge boundary before any normalized event reaches workers.
operationalRisk: If provider consoles bypass the edge, signature validation, replay checks, redaction, and provider-payload quarantine can be skipped.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: If a provider requires multiple callback paths, add typed /edge/signal/* aliases rather than exposing internal workers.
